referee.welcome_unknown: 👋 Welcome to RefereeBot! I relay anonymous chats between customers and specialists. First, sign up on the web app, then link your Telegram account from the Mini App.
referee.welcome_customer: 👋 Welcome back. Pick a project to talk to applicants anonymously.
referee.welcome_specialist: 👋 Welcome back. Use /menu to see active chats with customers.

chat.entered_customer:
💬 You're now in an anonymous chat with this specialist.
Type messages here; they'll be forwarded. Use /leave to exit.
chat.entered_specialist: 💬 Entered chat. Type messages here; /leave to exit.
